column1: Celebrated my birthday at this restaurant. Enjoyed the cocktails, especially the passionfruit margarita. The dishes are tapas style and smaller than expected. They were accommodating to dietary restrictions. The restaurant was crowded and tables were too close together. We tried a variety of dishes including truffle gnudi, steak tartare, and duck confit which were our favorites. However, we felt unwell after eating, possibly due to the tartare. The ceviche was disappointing and the fish

Placed an order through Ubereats from a restaurant I've frequented since its opening. The restaurant cancelled my order after 45 minutes without any communication. When I called, the owner said they were too busy to prepare my food. I've recommended this place to friends and family and rated them high on social media, but now I'm very disappointed.

Had a three-course dinner at a reasonably priced French restaurant in a nice neighborhood. We were seated in a cozy basement area. The food tasted excellent and the portions were good. Some of the staff spoke French which added to the authenticity. The service was great, our waitress was friendly and gave good recommendations. She was attentive and knew when to give us our space. Overall, a pleasant experience.
